name: Orange Cappuccino Drops
recipeIngredient: Or 2 teaspoons instant coffee dissolved in 1/2 cup hot water
3 oz Unsweetened chocolate, melted and cooled
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 375°F. In a large bowl, beat the brown sugar and butter until light and fluffy. Add the sour cream, coffee, chocolate, egg, and vanilla extract; blend well. Lightly spoon flour into measuring cup; level off. Stir in the flour and baking powder; mix well. The dough will be very soft. Drop the dough by teaspoonfuls 2 inches apart onto ungreased cookie sheets. Bake for 5 to 7 minutes, or until set. Immediately remove from the cookie sheets and cool completely. In a small bowl, combine the frosting ingredients, adding enough milk for desired spreading consistency. Frost the cooled cookies. Let stand until set. Store between layers of waxed paper in a tightly covered container.
